request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that while we're spending billions on NATO, some allies are only meeting the bare minimum? Take Germany for example - they've been consistently falling short of the 2% GDP defense spending target for years. Meanwhile, our troops are stretched thin. It's time to hold our allies accountable and ensure our sacrifices are matched. #StrongerAlliances #FairShare
